title: Sync future changes between "emails and activities" and items in the activity board
excerpt: We are using the “emails and activities” app to schedule Calls, Meetings and Tasks for our self or other team members. The automated generation of an item in the activity board together with the calendar synchronization …

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using the “emails and activities” app to schedule Calls, Meetings and Tasks for our self or other team members. The automated generation of an item in the activity board together with the calendar synchronization makes it easy to block time in the google-calendar and see all upcoming activities in the “My work” section.

It is convenient to change the time, name or description of an activity in the “My work” section or in the google-calendar. All changes are synchronized to the item in the activity board, but there is currently no synchronization to the “emails and activities” app.

It is disturbing to have for example different times between activity item and “emails and activities”-View (see screenshot).

Please change the “emails and activities” automatization to include the synchronization of future changes between “emails and activities” and items in the activity board.

Screenshot 2024-08-20 1503262722×1795 220 KB

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: How come this doesn’t get more upvotes? This is literally so basic CRM functionality… @Amarin have you found any good way to deal with this or received an answer elsewhere if this is even remotely on the roadmap?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have thought of this when first using E&A. A change log would be nice (at least in the activity log of the item I guess).

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am happy to hear more people are requesting this feature.
Until now I received no further information or solution.
So if somebody knows a workaround please enlighten me!
